inputs.titre: Création de la 'Banque mondiale de semences du Svalbard', un coffre-fort mondial pour les semences de plantes

reason: The image depicts the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. While the general scene aligns with the event, several anachronisms are present. The modern sportswear jackets and backpacks are anachronistic. The snowmobile and its cover displaying a modern brand logo ('The North Face') are significant anachronisms. The overall aesthetic, particularly the clothing, doesn't fully capture the feel of the event's early years, though some elements (wooden boxes, overall cold environment) are reasonable.
